name: ycc
description: Yandy's Codex plugin bundle: planning, implementation, git workflow, research, docs, orchestration, ask, and project utilities — all under the ycc: namespace.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, implementation, review, and workflow skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Yandy's Codex-native workflow bundle with planning, research, implementation, review, and GitHub-oriented development skills.
defaultPrompt: Use YCC to plan a medium-sized feature before implementation.
Use YCC to review my branch and summarize the highest-risk findings.
Use YCC to orchestrate a multi-step refactor across this repository.
